zh.lifeSummary: 當John Alexander Magby於1813年出生在美國阿拉巴馬州沃克時，他的父親William R Magby23歲，母親Mrs. Magby22歲。他於大約1832年與Francis C Sullivan在美國阿拉巴馬州結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他在美國阿肯色州住了大約5年且於1880年住在美國德州貝嘉絲蒂 普雷可特 2。他去世在美國德州貝諾曼納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Alexander Magby于1813年出生在美国亚拉巴马州沃克时，他的父亲William R Magby23岁，母亲Mrs. Magby22岁。他于大约1832年与Francis C Sullivan在美国亚拉巴马州结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他在美国阿肯色州住了大约5年且于1880年住在美国德州貝嘉絲蒂 普雷可特 2。他去世在美国德州貝諾曼納。

nameMeanings.name: Magby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McBee
meanings: Scottish: variant of McBay , itself a shortened form of McBeth . In Gaelic, -th- is silent.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1818: St. Clair, Alabama Territory, United States 1819: St. Clair, Alabama, United States

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.
Historical Boundaries:  1848: Goliad, Texas, United States  1857: Bee, Texas, United States

historicEvents.title: A Treaty with Hawaii
historicEvents.description: In the Mid 1870s, The United States sought out the Kingdom of Hawaii to make a free trade agreement. The Treaty gave the Hawaiians access to the United States agricultural markets and it gave the United States a part of land which later became Pearl Harbor.

historicEvents.title: Segregation Laws Are Passed
historicEvents.description: A new state constitution was passed in 1876, announcing the segregation of schools.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Texas State Historical Association - CONSTITUTION OF 1876

historicEvents.description: St. Louis, Missouri, United States hosts Summer Olympic Games.

historicEvents.title: Construction of the Praetorian Building
historicEvents.description: Texas completed the construction of the Praetorian Building (Stone Plane Tower) in 1909. It was the first skyscraper in Texas and the Southwestern United States.  The building had 15 stories and was 190 ft tall.

en.lifeSummary: When John Alexander Magby was born in 1813, in Walker, Alabama, United States, his father, William R Magby, was 23 and his mother, Mrs. Magby, was 22. He married Francis C Sullivan about 1832, in Alabama, United States. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Arkansas, United States for about 5 years and Justice Precinct 2, Bee, Texas, United States in 1880. He died in Normanna, Bee, Texas, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Alexander Magby est né en 1813, à Walker, Alabama, États-Unis, son père, William R Magby, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Magby, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Francis C Sullivan environ 1832, à Alabama, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Arkansas, États-Unis pendant environ 5 ans et à Justice Precinct 2, Bee, Texas, États-Unis en 1880. Il est décédé à Normanna, Bee, Texas, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Alexander Magby 1813 in Walker, Alabama, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater William R Magby 23 und seine Mutter Mrs. Magby 22. Er hat um 1832 in Alabama, Vereinigte Staaten Francis C Sullivan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er hat ungefähr 5 Jahre lang in Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt, und 1880 hat er in Justice Precinct 2, Bee, Texas, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb in Normanna, Bee, Texas, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Alexander Magby è nato il nel 1813 nel Walker, Alabama, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, William R Magby, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Magby, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Francis C Sullivan circa 1832, nel Alabama, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America per circa 5 anni e nel Justice Precinct 2, Bee, Texas, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1880. Morì nel Normanna, Bee, Texas, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Alexander Magbyが1813年にアメリカ合衆国アラバマ州ウォーカーで生まれた時，父William R Magbyは23歳，母Mrs. Magbyは22歳であった。約1832年にアメリカ合衆国アラバマ州でFrancis C Sullivanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼はアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州に約5年間，1880年にはアメリカ合衆国テキサス州ビージャスティス プレシンクト 2に住んでいた。彼はアメリカ合衆国テキサス州ビーノーマナで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Alexander Magby(이)가 1813년 미국 앨라배마 주 워커에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William R Magby(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Magby(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1832년 미국 앨라배마 주에서 Francis C Sullivan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 미국 아칸소 주에서 약 5년, 1880년도에 미국 텍사스 주 브이 저스티스 프레신크트 2에서 살았다. 그는 미국 텍사스 주 브이 노먼아에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Alexander Magby nasceu em 1813, em Walker, Alabama, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, William R Magby, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Magby, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Francis C Sullivan aproximadamente 1832, em Alabama, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América por quase 5 anos e em Justice Precinct 2, Bee, Texas, Estados Unidos da América em 1880. Ele faleceu em Normanna, Bee, Texas, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Alexander Magby родился в 1813 г. в местности валкир, Алабама, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени William R Magby было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Magby, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Francis C Sullivan около 1832 г. в местности Алабама, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности Арканзас, Соединенные штаты около 5 лет и в местности джюстаис пресинкт 2, би, Техас, Соединенные штаты в 1880 году. Он умер в местности норманна, би, Техас, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Alexander Magby nació en 1813, en Walker, Alabama, Estados Unidos, su papá, William R Magby, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Mrs. Magby, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Francis C Sullivan aproximadamente 1832, en Alabama, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Arkansas, Estados Unidos durante unos 5 años y en Justice Precinct 2, Bee, Texas, Estados Unidos en 1880. Murió en Normanna, Bee, Texas, Estados Unidos.
